title: spergula maritima
intro: Spergula maritima, also known as beach spurry, is a plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae, characterized by its delicate white flowers and ability to thrive in coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Spergula maritima include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation and swelling, and promote wound healing. Spergula maritima is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a convenient and accessible way.
